description: Fix isReady() returning isAuthenticated() synchronously without polling, causing the plugin to stay in the unavailable state when the eshares-csrftoken-2 cookie is not yet set at adapter injection time.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/carta && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add waitForAuth() polling to isReady() in carta/index.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/carta/src/index.ts, isReady() at line 62 calls `return isAuthenticated()` synchronously. If the eshares-csrftoken-2 cookie is not set when the adapter is first injected (e.g., on a cold page load or after login redirect), isReady() returns false immediately. The plugin stays in the unavailable state until the next readiness probe fires (up to 30 seconds), even though the cookie may become available within milliseconds. Follow the pattern used by other plugins: use waitForAuth() to poll before returning.
acceptanceCriteria: isReady() in index.ts calls waitForAuth() instead of or in addition to isAuthenticated()
isReady() resolves true once the eshares-csrftoken-2 cookie becomes available (within the waitForAuth() timeout)
isReady() still returns false if waitForAuth() times out (auth never becomes available)
